<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want to add or change.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope

- [ ] Guest experience
- [ ] Hotel owner experience
- [ ] API/server
- [ ] Payments/webhooks
- [ ] Setup/deployment
- [ ] Documentation

## Notes

Link related routes, pages, controllers, or docs when possible.
